title: Impossible Places
description: A cinematic travel magazine spanning five explorable Mint-generated Gaussian-splat worlds.

prompt.objective: Build a cinematic travel magazine connecting five impossible Gaussian-splat destinations.

mintAssets.brief: Five separate explorable worlds; import every final RAD stream with its matching collider.

experience: Blend full-viewport world exploration with an editorial travel cover.
Switch among five remote splat worlds without losing navigation context.
prompt.visualDirection: Dark travel journal with gold ornament, monumental serif type, and cinematic light.

thumbnail.alt: The Observatory issue of the Impossible Places travel magazine

social.title: Impossible Places
social.description: Travel through five impossible destinations in an interactive Gaussian-splat magazine.
